basic_details.job_title: Deendayal Port Authority – Assistant Manager – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Assistant Manager (Library). Candidates B.Lib Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 28-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Deendayal Port Authority official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Library Science/Library & Information Science, Certificate course in computer application, and 3 years post-qualification experience as Librarian.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager (Library) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Deendayal Port Authority Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
